creator: rafan@infor.org
text:
On Wed, Nov 29, 2006 at 09:58:32PM +0800, Rong-En Fan wrote:
> - Move to LOCALBASE

Sorry, it needs one more step

post-patch:
        @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's,^hiscoredir.*,hiscoredir=${DATADIR},' \
                ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in


Now it works well. 

Regards,
Rong-En Fan
